name: GOLFTEC Fairfax
address: 3903 Fair Ridge Dr Suite J & K, Fairfax, VA 22033
about: GOLFTEC Fairfax is a golf training and fitting center that uses technology to provide data-driven instruction and club fittings. The facility employs advanced motion measurement technology like OPTIMOTION, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback. Lessons are structured around personalized game plans developed by PGA-certified coaches, and the center offers practice memberships and club fittings, with the goal of accelerating improvement for golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized lesson plans created by PGA-certified coaches using data and video analysis
Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion tracking and launch monitors for precise feedback
One-time 60-day lesson plan pause option for flexibility in scheduling
Club fitting services that add an average of 21 more yards off the tee

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site alcohol service mentioned. BYOB policy not specified.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is recommended to bring your own clubs for lessons and practice sessions. The center also provides club fitting services if you are looking to be fitted for new equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food and beverage services. It is best to contact the location directly for their policy outside food and drink.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes is not specified, as GOLFTEC focuses on lessons, practice, and fittings rather than full-course simulation. Sessions are typically booked based on time per bay.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth, indicating it is suitable for families with children who are learning to play golf.
